simple_types.name: CMR0_CPRE_Field
simple_types.code:
type CMR0_CPRE_Field is
   MCK,
   MCK_DIV_2,
   MCK_DIV_4,
   MCK_DIV_8,
   MCK_DIV_16,
   MCK_DIV_32,
   MCK_DIV_64,
   MCK_DIV_128,
,
,
,
   …,
   CLKB)
  with Size => 4;

simple_types.name: SCM_UPDM_Field
simple_types.code:
type SCM_UPDM_Field is
   MODE0,
   MODE1,
   MODE2)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: MODE0
enumeration_literals.description:
Manual write of double buffer registers and automatic update of synchronous
channels

enumeration_literals.name: MODE1
enumeration_literals.description:
Automatic write of duty-cycle update registers by the PDC and automatic
update of synchronous channels
